jobs.title: Backend Software Engineer, Otter - Los Angeles
jobs.content: <p><strong>Backend Software Engineer</strong></p><p>Otter is the food-delivery infrastructure platform pioneered around multi-tenant virtual-restaurant & cloud-kitchen orchestration.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Hardware Engineer
jobs.content: <p>Lead Otter's Hardware Engineering function across the Brick-and-Mortar in-store POS stack.</p>
